case_title: DRUCH, DARYA et al VS MCKINNON, RACHEL: PRES. et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ALTA APARTMENTS, INC.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DRUCH, DARYA PELED, OPHER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALTA APARTMENTS, INC. SCHULTZ, LARRY SCHULTZ, MAE $350.00 PRINCIPAL, $35.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $385.00, DEFT. ALTA APARTMENTS, INC. FOR $175. AND DEFTS LARRY & MAE SCHULTZ FOR $175.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
